message:
chore(beads): close bd-xn6p8 (fuzz_mount verified end-to-end)

Closes the FUZZ: mount/umount/umount2 + fs* family bead. fuzz_mount.rs
already shipped to HEAD; this session re-verified via rch with
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_cc_xn6p8: 11.73M runs at 97K
exec/s over 120s, no crashes.

DB-direct close was blocked by stuck swarm-mate br processes (PIDs
2278861 and 3343963 spinning at 99% CPU on br show/br ready since the
prior day); fell back to JSONL-direct append so the close state is
captured in the source of truth. Next agent's br sync --import-only
will absorb.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
